title: Property Booking Scraper
description: Scrapes a single Booking.com property page and returns one row per room type with final pricing.

url.title: Property URL
url.description: Full Booking.com property URL (include checkin/checkout dates in query params)

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Desired currency code (e.g. NZD, USD, EUR)

bookingEmail.title: Booking.com Email
bookingEmail.description: Optional: your Booking.com login email for member/Genius pricing
